calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Setting Aside And Vacating Default Judgment Of Jul 14, 2011
Off Calendar Nov-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ELISE SARA OF SHEPPARD MULLIN, TEL. NO. 774-3297 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS VAHE BADALIAN, RAZMIK OHANJANIAN, JILBERT TAHMAZIAN AND HAMLET BET-SARGHEZ' MOTION For Order Setting Aside And Vacating Default Judgment Of Jul 14, 2011 is denied. Defendants have not set forth any justification for relied. There is no attorney affidavit of fault. CCP Section 473(b). Defendants neither diligently pursued nor timely moved to set aside entry of default or default judgment. (CCP 473(b).) In addition, defendants have not set forth a meritorious defense to the action, or a justifiable excuse for failure to respond to the complaint. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla Miller, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =302/MM

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Setting Aside And Vacating Default Judgment Of Jul 14, 2011
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Continued To Nov-14-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
DEFENDANTS VAHE BADALIAN, RAZMIK OHANJANIAN, JILBERT TAHMAZIAN and HAMLET BET-SARGHEZ' Motion For Order Setting Aside And Vacating Default Judgment Of Jul 14, 2011 is continued to November 14, 2011. The court did receive courtesy copies of the moving papers today. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-14-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

ELISE SARA, Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) NORTH BEACH RETAIL ASSOC, LLC
Plaintiff's Witness: LINDA TILTON was placed under oath and direct examined.

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) HAMLET BET SAR for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $32,775.10
Attorney's Fees - $8180.50
Costs - $355.00
Total judgment in the amount of $41,310.60

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2011 Continued To Aug-19-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
